title: Files with no recent modifications
description: Flag files that have not been modified beyond a configurable threshold. Stale files may indicate dead code or missing maintenance.

basis.title: Analysis basis
basis.description: Review the repository and staleness threshold before inspecting stale files.

ranking.title: Stale file ranking
ranking.description: Files sorted by days since last modification. Longer staleness may indicate dead code or neglected areas.

details.title: File details
details.criticalReading: This file has not been modified for an extended period. Consider reviewing whether it is still needed.
details.staleReading: This file has not been modified recently. It may need attention or could be intentionally stable.

empty.noStaleFiles: No stale files detected above the threshold.
empty.selectWorkspace: Select a repository to detect stale files.
